---
title: "The Stokesley Secret - Charlotte Mary Yonge"
year: 1861
slug: "stokesley"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


###   
**Online text of**The Stokesley Secret****

[Click here to reach the latest version of**The Stokesley Secret**from Gutenberg](https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/3411)  

[Click here to reach the latest version of**The Stokesley Secret**from the Internet Archive](https://archive.org/details/stokesleysecret00yonggoog/page/n10/mode/2up)
